enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Mellisaiye?

The song Mellisaiye expresses deep romantic feelings and the beauty of love, making it a perfect choice for special occasions.

What is the plot context of the movie Mr Romeo?

Mr Romeo revolves around themes of love and relationships, showcasing the journey of the protagonists as they navigate their emotions.

Who are the singers of Mellisaiye?

The song features the talented voices of Swarnalatha and Unni Menon.

Who composed the music for Mellisaiye?

The music for Mellisaiye was composed by the renowned A.R. Rahman.

When was Mellisaiye released?

Mellisaiye was released on November 10, 1996.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mellisaiye, the protagonists express their profound love through enchanting melodies and heartfelt lyrics. The song beautifully captures the essence of romance, making it a quintessential piece for weddings and anniversaries. With its soothing rhythm and nostalgic vibe, it evokes emotions of longing and affection. This timeless track remains a favorite among fans of Tamil cinema, showcasing the brilliance of A.R. Rahman's music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mellisaiye from the movie Mr Romeo is a timeless romantic melody that beautifully captures the essence of love. Featuring the enchanting voices of Swarnalatha and Unni Menon, this song is a perfect blend of heartfelt lyrics and mesmerizing music. Experience the magic of A.R. Rahman's composition that continues to resonate with listeners even today.
stanzaMeanings: Sweet music of my heart, sweet music of my relationship, sweet music that connects with my life.
I opened my eyes a little, you fell into my sight, I closed my eyes and captured you in my little eyes.
Sweet music of my heart, sweet music of my relationship, sweet music that connects with my life.
How many nights I stayed awake for you, without sleeping, I waited for the stars to shine.
How many moments I waited for you, holding my life, I found my life when I saw you.
You are half of me, and I am half of you, a bond of love.
Even if the earth is a sea, this bond will never fade away.
I opened my eyes a little, you fell into my sight, I closed my eyes and captured you in my little eyes.
The seed of love was sown with the heart, who nurtured it with rain, who protected it from the wild?
Who raised the fire of love, who hid it with their hands, who brought it together?
Love will last for a thousand years, and life will continue with love.
Oh beautiful girl... even if the earth and sky go away, this bond will not change.
I opened my eyes a little, you fell into my sight, I closed my eyes and captured you in my little eyes.
I opened my eyes a little, you fell into my sight, I closed my eyes and captured you in my little eyes.
I opened my eyes a little, you fell into my sight, I closed my eyes and captured you in my little eyes.
